description: A portrait-format graphic built on a darkened close-up photograph of an adult man with a shaved head and short beard looking toward the camera against a plain wall. A FOX NEWS brand mark sits over the lower middle, with large white serif headline text below reading Suspect in string of random attacks in Georgia is naturalized citizen from UK, and a smaller italic subhead. A small Department of Homeland Security seal appears at the very bottom.
notable_text: FOX NEWS; Suspect in string of random attacks in Georgia is naturalized citizen from UK
